heading: Enforcement by the Board
label: 15902 Enforcement by the Board
text: The Board may bring a civil action to enforce an order of the Board, except a civil action to enforce an order for the payment of money, when it is violated by a pipeline carrier providing transportation subject to this part.
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in prior to the general amendment of this subtitle by .section 11702 of this titlePub. L. 104–88, § 102(a)
Effective DateSection effective , except as otherwise provided in , see , set out as a note under .Jan. 1, 1996Pub. L. 104–88section 2 of Pub. L. 104–88section 1301 of this title
